personal.name: Mradul Sharma

projects.name: Resume Generator Agent
projects.description: AI-powered CLI tool that generates professional resumes using Claude Agent SDK. Takes structured JSON input and produces ATS-friendly HTML resumes.

projects.name: Vendor Management System
